channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 18th June
item.description:
CW Pothole around ironwork 700mm x 600mm x 44mm Stats required Temporary Closure 15min db Outside Grayswood (CW10 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 18th June
item.description:
Cut hedge back to boundary 60mt long x2.5 Mt's high StandardTM required with fway closure (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 18th June
item.description:
Cut back tree to safety 2mts long x2.5mts high Standard TM required with fway closure (Overgrown Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime tree obscuring road visibility, 18th June
item.description:
Just off roundabout where Boverton Drive meets Ermin Park. Lime tree on Highways verge has significant basal growth that is obscuring visibility for pedestrians on the pavement and residents exiting driveway onto road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Boverton Drive, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Estate agent fixing for sale board to street sign., 18th June
item.description:
I would like to report an estate agent’s “For Sale” sign that has been attached to a public road sign outside my property in Hucclecote. The property being advertised is not my house, and I am concerned that the sign has been placed on highway furniture without permission. Please could you investigate whether this advertisement complies with the relevant regulations and arrange for its removal if appropriate. As of yesterday council contractors cutting the grass verge have removed from the street sign and shoved it into my hedge. Wrongly assuming that it is my house for sale. This has now damaged the hedge.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bulford Close, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
